programme.desc: Ní thuigeann Dean cén fáth nach bhfuil aon duine in ann an ceann is fearr a fháil ar Choilí Jackie. (Dean is sick of everyone's incompetence when it comes to persuading Cóilí Jackie.)

programme.title: Ros na Rún
programme.desc: Ní thuigeann Dean cén fáth nach bhfuil aon duine in ann an ceann is fearr a fháil ar Choilí Jackie. (Dean is sick of everyone's incompetence when it comes to persuading Cóilí Jackie.)

programme.title: Fargo
programme.desc: Féachann sirriam contae in Dakota ord a chur in bhfeidhm ina limistéar féin. (North Dakota county Sheriff Roy Tillman tries to re-establish the 'natural order of things'.)

programme.title: Dáil Éireann
programme.desc: Craoladh ar imeachtaí na maidine de riar na hoibre i nDáil Éireann. (Coverage of today's proceedings in Dáil Éireann.)

programme.title: Cuimhní Órga Spóirt
programme.desc: Deis eile Tiobraid Árann vs Corcaigh sa tSraith Allianz na bliana 2014 a fheiceáil. (Another chance to see Tipperary vs Cork in the 2014 Allianz Hurling League.)

programme.title: Nuacht TG4
programme.desc: Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)

programme.title: An Deis
programme.desc: Tugann trí fhoireann aghaidh ar a chéile chun an pota óir a bhuachan. Seó cluichí á chur i láthair ag Eibhlín Ní Chonghaile. (Gameshow in which 3 teams compete to win the jackpot.)

programme.title: Pobal Mhúscraí
programme.desc: Tugtar léargas ar na pobail i sé cheantar i nGaeltacht Mhúscraí i gContae Chorcaí sa tsraith seo. (In this series we get an insight into the communities of the Múscraí Gaeltacht.)

programme.title: Laochra Gael
programme.desc: Scéal Bernard Flynn a bhí lárnach in athbheochan na peile sa Mhí faoi stiúir Sheáin Boylan. (Laochra Gael continues with the story of Meath's Bernard Flynn.)

programme.title: Beidh Aonach Amárach
programme.desc: Bíonn neart le feiceáil ar an ráschúrsa ag Seó Chluain Meala i dTiobraid Árainn. (The racecourse is busy at the historic Clonmel Show in Tipperary.)

programme.title: France 24
programme.desc: Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)

programme.title: Cúla4
programme.desc: Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)

programme.title: Bréidín & Clúmh
programme.desc: Téann Clúmh isteach i mbuatais chun a Chnaipe Eitilte a fháil ach cinneann sé air teacht amach as! (Fluff climbs into a wellington boot looking for his beloved Whizzy Button!)

programme.title: CoComelon It's Cody Time
programme.desc: Téann Cody agus a chara nua Cece ag spaisteoireacht. (Cody and his new friend Cece go for a walk.)

programme.title: CoComelon JJ's Animal
programme.desc: Is ar fheirm Dhaideo a bheifear inniu. (We visit Old MacDonald's farm today.)

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Cuireann an Chearc Mhór Dhearg an fhoraois bháistí faoi dhraíocht agus tarlaíonn rudaí aisteacha. (Big Red Chicken's magic causes wacky things to happen throughout the rainforest.)

programme.title: Elmo Anseo
programme.desc: Ag foghlaim faoi scamaill a bheidh Elmo inniu. (Elmo is learning all about clouds today.)

programme.title: Pip & Posy
programme.desc: Tá Pip & Posy ag iarraidh ardú croí a thabhairt do Frankie. (Pip & Posy try to help Frankie feel better about no-one choosing her modelling clay food creations on their stall.)

programme.title: Olobob Top
programme.desc: Teastaíonn cúnamh ó Lalloo cuimhneamh ar amhrán álainn a chum sí agus í sa bhforaois. (Lalloo needs Little Chirp's help to remember a beautiful song she made up.)

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: Oibríonn Cailín Luna agus na Coileáin as lámh a chéile. (Luna Girl works with the Wolfies to distract the PJ Masks while she steals the museum.)

programme.title: Wussywat
programme.desc: Milleann Wussywat na héadaí a bhí nite ag Nín. Cén chaoi a nífidh sí arís iad? (Wussywat manages to muddy up Ird's washing. How will she get it clean again?)

programme.title: Clifford
programme.desc: Tá spéaclaí faighte ag Antaine ach ní mórán fonn atá air iad a chaitheamh. (Anthony is hesitant to wear his new glasses around town.)

programme.title: Woozle & Pip
programme.desc: Tá Woozle ag iarraidh a bheith ina shárlaoch! (Woozle wants to be a superhero.)

programme.title: Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Tá bolg Ginger tinn agus caithfidh na Piseanna-Rex leigheas a aimsiú di. (When Ginger gets a nasty tummy ache, the Pea-Rexes have to find a special soothing herb.)

programme.title: Dialann Alice
programme.desc: Scríobhann Alice litreacha dá cairde. (Alice delivers letters to her friends, to show her love.)

programme.title: Dialann Alice
programme.desc: Tá Mama agus Alice ag cumadh cluichí beaga. (Mom and Alice create games together.)

programme.title: Dialann Alice
programme.desc: Tá faitíos ar Emile tumadh isteach san uisce. (Emile is afraid to dive into the water.)

programme.title: Scoil na Sceire
programme.desc: Tá rún ag deilfeanna Shelley a bheith ina gcleasghleacaithe sa sorcas. (The Shelley dolphins reveal their plan to become circus acrobats.)

programme.title: Cúla4
programme.desc: Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)

programme.title: Charlie agus Lola
programme.desc: Tá rún ag Lola agus Lotta airgead a bhailiú chun cabhrú le panda. (Lola and Lotta are adopting a panda and decide to raise money for it.)

programme.title: Petronix Defenders
programme.desc: Tá na Petronix ag iarraidh sionnach óg a chur ar ais sa bhfiántas. (The Petronix Defenders try to return a little fox pup back to the wild.)

programme.title: Pat an Madra
programme.desc: Caithfidh Pat teacht i gcabhair ar Chaipín, a d'éalaigh le bróiste mháthair Lola. (Pat has to rescue Caipín, who has run off with Lola's mother's brooch.)

programme.title: Angelo Rules
programme.desc: Níl suim ar bith ag Angelo a bheith ag staidéar dá chuid scrúduithe. (Angelo wants to procrastinate instead of studying for a test.)

programme.title: Dónall Dána
programme.desc: Tugann an Mháistreás Máiléad obair bhaile cheolmhar don rang. (Dónall's teacher gives the class some musical homework.)

programme.title: Cúla4
programme.desc: Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)

programme.title: Super Simple Amhráin
programme.desc: Amhrán spraíúil faoi do cheann, do ghuaillí, do ghlúine agus do bharraicíní. (A fun song about your head, shoulders, knees and toes.)

programme.title: Blocuimhreacha
programme.desc: Tá tomhais le réiteach ag na Blocuimhreacha. (A fantastic treat awaits the Numberblocks if they can figure out how to Ride the Rays to the top of Ray Canyon.)

programme.title: Blocdhathanna
programme.desc: Eagraíonn Corcra comórtas pátrúin. (Purple Organises a Pattern Competition.)

programme.title: Na Blociontais
programme.desc: Tá chuile shórt agus chuile dhuine ag bogadh mar gheall ar Ghabh! (Go gets everyone and everything moving! What could possibly go wrong?)

programme.title: Seal le Timmy
programme.desc: Taispeánann Harriet do Timmy le spraoi a bhaint as preabadán. (Harriet has to show Timmy what a space hopper is really for: loads of bouncy fun!)

programme.title: Lá Le Mamó nó Daideo
programme.desc: Tá Tomás leis an lá a chaitheamh in éineacht lena Dhaideo Pádraic atá ina chónaí in Árainn. (Tomás is going to spend his day with his Daideo Pádraic today.)

programme.title: Pip & Posy
programme.desc: Tagann Pip ar mhaide a bhfuil 'an t-ádh' ag baint leis, dar le Pip! (Pip finds a 'lucky stick' which he and Posy use to help their friends.)

programme.title: Béiríní is a Leabhair
programme.desc: Ní maith le Bromaire an cluiche 'Cá bhfuil na Béiríní? (Bromaire doesn't like playing 'Where Are You Bears?' because he doesn't like being alone.)

programme.title: Béiríní is a Leabhair
programme.desc: Faigheann na Béiríní amach nach é an bronntanas is tábhachtaí ach go gcuimhneodh tú ar an duine. (The Bears learn that it is not the surprise that's important but the thought.)

programme.title: Pikwik Pack

programme.title: Nuair a Bheidh Mé Mór

programme.title: Zou

programme.title: Ainmhithe Craiceáilte
programme.desc: Beidh béar bán ag imirt cispheile, cocatú ag spraoi agus caitín óg ag déanamh obair tí inniu. (Today we have a polar bear playing basketball and a kitten helps with chores.)

programme.title: Comhrá
programme.desc: Iar-Aire Rialtais de chuid Fhianna Fáil, Pat Carey, a bheidh ag comhrá le Máirtín. (Pat Carey, a former Minister of State with Fianna Fáil is Máirtín¿s guest.)

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Caithfidh gach duine tearmann a ghlacadh i stáisiún teilifíse ón hairicín. (A police evacuation during a hurricane forces everyone to take refuge at the TV station.)

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Tugann Rose bata agus bóthar don suarachán Miles. (Rose gives the boot to penny-pinching Miles.)

programme.title: Abair Amhrán
programme.desc: Ceiliúradh ar amhráin a bhíodh againn ag éirí aníos. (Series which celebrates and takes a fresh look at the songs of our schooldays.)
